mapper.select:
SELECT b.id, a.create_id createId, DATE_FORMAT(b.overtime_day, '%Y-%m') overtimeMonth, b.overtime_hour overtimeHour, b.overtime_settlement_type overtimeSettlementType FROM check_work_overtime a, check_work_overtime_time_slot b WHERE a.id = b.parent_id AND b.state = #{childState} AND b.settle_state = 1
AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND b.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
